overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring an industrial underground settlement with stone walls and metal structures. The character walks through narrow corridors and ascends stone stairs in a dimly lit, artificial environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow industrial corridor in a spacesuit with a red backpack

entered.detail: overhead metal covering with illuminated W sign hanging from it
textured stone walls with industrial piping attached
large yellow and orange industrial storage box
silver metal railings along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor with rough stone walls and overhead metal canopies. A yellow storage container sits to the right while industrial pipes run along the left wall. The environment is dimly lit by artificial overhead lights.

events.description: passing through circular stone archway into deeper corridor section

agents.ego_description: continuing through the stone corridor toward the yellow industrial building and stairwell

entered.detail: large circular tunnel entrance with metal framing
multi-story yellow industrial structure with metal panels
metal scaffolding and platforms attached to the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a circular stone archway into a deeper section of the industrial complex. A large yellow industrial building becomes visible ahead while metal scaffolding lines the right wall. The ground transitions to a dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairwell ascending alongside industrial structure

events.description: character begins ascending stone stairs toward upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs alongside the yellow industrial building

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with metal handrails on both sides
green plants growing in wall-mounted containers
upper level walkway with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by metal handrails. The yellow industrial building now dominates the right side while sparse vegetation appears on the left wall. The camera follows the character upward toward an elevated platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim industrial corridor that gradually opens into a larger complex and ascends toward an elevated platform. It begins with the character walking through a narrow passage of rough stone walls and overhead metal canopies, passing a yellow storage container and industrial piping. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts through a circular stone archway where the ground transitions to a dirt path and a large yellow industrial building emerges ahead. The camera then follows the character as they ascend a wide stone staircase flanked by metal handrails, with the industrial building dominating the right side and sparse vegetation appearing on the left. The movement finally carries the character upward, leaving the corridor behind to reach an elevated platform.
